betterquesting:10.desc:8:
This mod adds several environmental hazards that will kill you if ignored.

§6Radiation§r is measured in RAD. Effects begin at §e200 RAD§r and worsen steadily - instant death occurs at §c1000 RAD§r. Use a §6Geiger Counter§r to monitor your dose. Radiation-resistant armor and §6Rad-X§r reduce incoming RAD; a §3Player Decontaminator§r or §6Antirads§r remove accumulated dose.

§lMesothelioma§r develops from asbestos exposure. Items tagged §c[Contains Asbestos]§r and certain blocks like Chrysotile release asbestos particles. Progresses to death if untreated.

§lBlack Lung§r develops from coal dust exposure. Mining coal ore and carrying items tagged §c[Coal Dust]§r are the main sources. Also fatal.

A gas mask protects against both mesothelioma and black lung simultaneously. Both diseases are cured by §6SIOX Cancer Medication§r or, early-game, §6Herbal Paste§r - the latter being weaker and carrying side effects.
